sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96031" key="spondaule/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπονδ-αυλέω</orth>, <sense id="n96031.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">play the flute at a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σπονδή</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:56" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.56</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
